reason: The item cleanly targets a single expert judgment axis: interpreting propagation-time deltas as evidence of heat-transfer mitigation (rate) versus binary prevention (outcome), while requiring identification of a specific limiting material property (shrinkage-driven loss of contact). Decoy space is implicitly controlled by the required elements (mechanism, evaluation of both colleagues, and a limiting property), creating good discrimination against common overgeneralizations. Minor weakness is structural/linguistic neutrality: the prompt somewhat steers toward the “rate matters” frame and demands a very specific property detail, which can reduce boundary tightness for otherwise competent answers lacking that exact phrasing.
